files.autovcoder_093120.v:
module autovcoder_093120 (
    sub,
    opa,
    opb,
    out,
    co
);
  input sub;
  input [7:0] opa, opb;
  output [7:0] out;
  output co;

  wire add;
  assign add = ~sub;

  // INST_TAG
  xilinx_add_sub8_co u0 (
      .A0(opa[0]),
      .A1(opa[1]),
      .A2(opa[2]),
      .A3(opa[3]),
      .A4(opa[4]),
      .A5(opa[5]),
      .A6(opa[6]),
      .A7(opa[7]),

      .B0(opb[0]),
      .B1(opb[1]),
      .B2(opb[2]),
      .B3(opb[3]),
      .B4(opb[4]),
      .B5(opb[5]),
      .B6(opb[6]),
      .B7(opb[7]),

      .C_OUT(co),
      .ADD  (add),

      .S0(out[0]),
      .S1(out[1]),
      .S2(out[2]),
      .S3(out[3]),
      .S4(out[4]),
      .S5(out[5]),
      .S6(out[6]),
      .S7(out[7])
  );
  // INST_TAG_END

endmodule

files.autovcoder_079162.v:
module autovcoder_079162 (
    input  [13:0] addr_i_0,
    input         we_i_0,
    input  [15:0] data_i_0,
    output [15:0] data_o_0,

    input  [13:0] addr_i_1,
    input         we_i_1,
    input  [15:0] data_i_1,
    output [15:0] data_o_1,

    input  [13:0] addr_i_2,
    input         we_i_2,
    input  [15:0] data_i_2,
    output [15:0] data_o_2,

    input  [13:0] addr_i_3,
    input         we_i_3,
    input  [15:0] data_i_3,
    output [15:0] data_o_3,

    input  [13:0] addr_i_4,
    input         we_i_4,
    input  [15:0] data_i_4,
    output [15:0] data_o_4,


    output [13:0] addr_mem,
    output        we_mem,
    output [15:0] data_i_mem,
    input  [15:0] data_o_mem,

    input [2:0] sel
);

  assign addr_mem =   (sel == 0) ?    addr_i_0 : 
                        (sel == 1) ?    addr_i_1 : 
                        (sel == 2) ?    addr_i_2 : 
                        (sel == 3) ?    addr_i_3 : 
                                        addr_i_4 ;

  assign we_mem =     (sel == 0) ?    we_i_0 : 
                        (sel == 1) ?    we_i_1 : 
                        (sel == 2) ?    we_i_2 : 
                        (sel == 3) ?    we_i_3 : 
                                        we_i_4 ;

  assign data_i_mem = (sel == 0) ?    data_i_0 : 
                        (sel == 1) ?    data_i_1 : 
                        (sel == 2) ?    data_i_2 : 
                        (sel == 3) ?    data_i_3 : 
                                        data_i_4 ;

  assign data_o_0 = data_o_mem;
  assign data_o_1 = data_o_mem;
  assign data_o_2 = data_o_mem;
  assign data_o_3 = data_o_mem;
  assign data_o_4 = data_o_mem;


endmodule

files.origen_099631.v:
module origen_099631 (
    input [7:0] in1, in2,
    input cin, m,
    input [3:0] s,
    output reg [7:0] out,
    output aeb, cout
);

    always @(*) begin
        case ({m, s, cin})
            // Logical Mode (m == 1)
            6'b100000: out = ~in1;                    // NOT in1
            6'b100010: out = in1 & in2;               // AND
            6'b100100: out = in1 | in2;               // OR
            6'b100110: out = in1 ^ in2;               // XOR
            6'b101000: out = ~(in1 & in2);            // NAND
            6'b101010: out = ~(in1 | in2);            // NOR
            6'b101100: out = ~(in1 ^ in2);            // XNOR
            6'b101110: out = in1;                     // Buffer in1
            6'b110000: out = ~in2;                    // NOT in2
            6'b110010: out = in1 & ~in2;              // AND-NOT
            6'b110100: out = in1 | ~in2;              // OR-NOT
            6'b110110: out = in2;                     // Buffer in2
            6'b111000: out = {in1[7:4], in2[3:0]};    // Upper in1, Lower in2
            6'b111010: out = {in2[7:4], in1[3:0]};    // Upper in2, Lower in1
            6'b111100: out = in1 << 1;                // Left shift in1
            6'b111110: out = in1 >> 1;                // Right shift in1

            // Arithmetic Mode (m == 0)
            6'b000000: out = in1 + in2 + cin;         // Addition with carry
            6'b000010: out = in1 - in2 - cin;         // Subtraction with borrow
            6'b000100: out = in1 + 1;                 // Increment in1
            6'b000110: out = in1 - 1;                 // Decrement in1
            6'b001000: out = in2 + 1;                 // Increment in2
            6'b001010: out = in2 - 1;                 // Decrement in2
            6'b001100: out = in1 + in2;               // Addition
            6'b001110: out = in1 - in2;               // Subtraction
            6'b010000: out = (in1 + in2) & in1;       // Add and AND with in1
            6'b010010: out = (in1 - in2) | in2;       // Subtract and OR with in2
            6'b010100: out = (in1 + in2) ^ in1;       // Add and XOR with in1
            6'b010110: out = (in1 - in2) ^ in2;       // Subtract and XOR with in2
            6'b011000: out = in1 * in2[3:0];          // Multiply in1 by lower 4 bits of in2
            6'b011010: out = in1 / (in2[3:0] + 1);    // Divide in1 by (lower 4 bits of in2 + 1)
            6'b011100: out = {in1[3:0], in2[3:0]};    // Concatenate lower 4 bits
            6'b011110: out = (in1 + in2) << 1;        // Add and left shift

            default: out = 8'b0;                      // Default case
        endcase
    end

    assign aeb = (in1 == in2);
    assign cout = in1[7] & in2[7];

endmodule

files.autovcoder_010701.v:
module autovcoder_010701 (
    input  signed [ 7:0] multiplier,
    multiplicand,
    output signed [15:0] product
);

  wire signed [7:0] Q[0:6];  //an 8 bit (1byte) array, with a depth of 7 (0 to 6 rows of 1 byte each)
  wire signed [7:0] acc[0:7]; //an 8 bit (1byte) array, with a depth of 8 (0 to 7 rows of 1 byte each)
  wire signed [7:0] q0;
  wire qout;

  assign acc[0] = 8'b00000000;  //initialising accumulator to 0

  booth_substep step1 (
      acc[0],
      multiplier,
      1'b0,
      multiplicand,
      acc[1],
      Q[0],
      q0[1]
  );
  booth_substep step2 (
      acc[1],
      Q[0],
      q0[1],
      multiplicand,
      acc[2],
      Q[1],
      q0[2]
  );
  booth_substep step3 (
      acc[2],
      Q[1],
      q0[2],
      multiplicand,
      acc[3],
      Q[2],
      q0[3]
  );
  booth_substep step4 (
      acc[3],
      Q[2],
      q0[3],
      multiplicand,
      acc[4],
      Q[3],
      q0[4]
  );
  booth_substep step5 (
      acc[4],
      Q[3],
      q0[4],
      multiplicand,
      acc[5],
      Q[4],
      q0[5]
  );
  booth_substep step6 (
      acc[5],
      Q[4],
      q0[5],
      multiplicand,
      acc[6],
      Q[5],
      q0[6]
  );
  booth_substep step7 (
      acc[6],
      Q[5],
      q0[6],
      multiplicand,
      acc[7],
      Q[6],
      q0[7]
  );
  booth_substep step8 (
      acc[7],
      Q[6],
      q0[7],
      multiplicand,
      product[15:8],
      product[7:0],
      qout
  );


endmodule

module autovcoder_090354 #(
    parameter C_PCIE_DATA_WIDTH  = 128,
    parameter C_PCIE_ADDR_WIDTH  = 36,
    parameter C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH = 64
) (
    input pcie_user_clk,
    input pcie_user_rst_n,

    input [2:0] pcie_max_payload_size,

    input         pcie_tx_cmd_wr_en,
    input  [33:0] pcie_tx_cmd_wr_data,
    output        pcie_tx_cmd_full_n,

    output                         tx_dma_mwr_req,
    output [                  7:0] tx_dma_mwr_tag,
    output [                 11:2] tx_dma_mwr_len,
    output [C_PCIE_ADDR_WIDTH-1:2] tx_dma_mwr_addr,
    input                          tx_dma_mwr_req_ack,
    input                          tx_dma_mwr_data_last,

    input                          pcie_tx_dma_fifo_rd_en,
    output [C_PCIE_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] pcie_tx_dma_fifo_rd_data,

    output        dma_tx_done_wr_en,
    output [20:0] dma_tx_done_wr_data,
    input         dma_tx_done_wr_rdy_n,

    input dma_bus_clk,
    input dma_bus_rst_n,

    input                           pcie_tx_fifo_alloc_en,
    input  [                   9:4] pcie_tx_fifo_alloc_len,
    input                           pcie_tx_fifo_wr_en,
    input  [C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] pcie_tx_fifo_wr_data,
    output                          pcie_tx_fifo_full_n
);

  wire        w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_en;
  wire [33:0] w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_data;
  wire        w_pcie_tx_cmd_empty_n;

  wire        w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_en;
  wire [ 9:4] w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_len;
  wire        w_pcie_tx_fifo_empty_n;


  pcie_tx_cmd_fifo pcie_tx_cmd_fifo_inst0 (
      .clk  (pcie_user_clk),
      .rst_n(pcie_user_rst_n),

      .wr_en  (pcie_tx_cmd_wr_en),
      .wr_data(pcie_tx_cmd_wr_data),
      .full_n (pcie_tx_cmd_full_n),

      .rd_en  (w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_en),
      .rd_data(w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_data),
      .empty_n(w_pcie_tx_cmd_empty_n)
  );

  pcie_tx_fifo pcie_tx_fifo_inst0 (
      .wr_clk  (dma_bus_clk),
      .wr_rst_n(pcie_user_rst_n),

      .alloc_en (pcie_tx_fifo_alloc_en),
      .alloc_len(pcie_tx_fifo_alloc_len),
      .wr_en    (pcie_tx_fifo_wr_en),
      .wr_data  (pcie_tx_fifo_wr_data),
      .full_n   (pcie_tx_fifo_full_n),

      .rd_clk  (pcie_user_clk),
      .rd_rst_n(pcie_user_rst_n),

      .rd_en   (pcie_tx_dma_fifo_rd_en),
      .rd_data (pcie_tx_dma_fifo_rd_data),
      .free_en (w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_en),
      .free_len(w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_len),
      .empty_n (w_pcie_tx_fifo_empty_n)
  );

  pcie_tx_req #(
      .C_PCIE_DATA_WIDTH(C_PCIE_DATA_WIDTH),
      .C_PCIE_ADDR_WIDTH(C_PCIE_ADDR_WIDTH)
  ) pcie_tx_req_inst0 (
      .pcie_user_clk  (pcie_user_clk),
      .pcie_user_rst_n(pcie_user_rst_n),

      .pcie_max_payload_size(pcie_max_payload_size),

      .pcie_tx_cmd_rd_en  (w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_en),
      .pcie_tx_cmd_rd_data(w_pcie_tx_cmd_rd_data),
      .pcie_tx_cmd_empty_n(w_pcie_tx_cmd_empty_n),

      .pcie_tx_fifo_free_en (w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_en),
      .pcie_tx_fifo_free_len(w_pcie_tx_fifo_free_len),
      .pcie_tx_fifo_empty_n (w_pcie_tx_fifo_empty_n),

      .tx_dma_mwr_req      (tx_dma_mwr_req),
      .tx_dma_mwr_tag      (tx_dma_mwr_tag),
      .tx_dma_mwr_len      (tx_dma_mwr_len),
      .tx_dma_mwr_addr     (tx_dma_mwr_addr),
      .tx_dma_mwr_req_ack  (tx_dma_mwr_req_ack),
      .tx_dma_mwr_data_last(tx_dma_mwr_data_last),

      .dma_tx_done_wr_en   (dma_tx_done_wr_en),
      .dma_tx_done_wr_data (dma_tx_done_wr_data),
      .dma_tx_done_wr_rdy_n(dma_tx_done_wr_rdy_n)
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_116448.v:
module autovcoder_116448 (
    a,
    b,
    result_sub1
);  // test bench
  // signals used in test bench (the interconnections)

  input [7:0] a;  // so bi tru
  input [7:0] b;  // so tru
  output [8:0] result_sub1;

  wire [8:0] cout;
  // tang 1: khoi tru
  //        
  // a,b,t,c_in,r,q
  cas_1bit bit03 (
      a[0],
      b[0],
      1'b1,
      1'b1,
      result_sub1[0],
      cout[0]
  );
  cas_1bit bit04 (
      a[1],
      b[1],
      1'b1,
      cout[0],
      result_sub1[1],
      cout[1]
  );
  cas_1bit bit05 (
      a[2],
      b[2],
      1'b1,
      cout[1],
      result_sub1[2],
      cout[2]
  );
  cas_1bit bit06 (
      a[3],
      b[3],
      1'b1,
      cout[2],
      result_sub1[3],
      cout[3]
  );
  cas_1bit bit07 (
      a[4],
      b[4],
      1'b1,
      cout[3],
      result_sub1[4],
      cout[4]
  );
  cas_1bit bit08 (
      a[5],
      b[5],
      1'b1,
      cout[4],
      result_sub1[5],
      cout[5]
  );
  cas_1bit bit09 (
      a[6],
      b[6],
      1'b1,
      cout[5],
      result_sub1[6],
      cout[6]
  );
  cas_1bit bit00 (
      a[7],
      b[7],
      1'b1,
      cout[6],
      result_sub1[7],
      cout[7]
  );
  cas_1bit bit01 (
      1'b0,
      1'b0,
      1'b1,
      cout[7],
      result_sub1[8],
      cout[8]
  );


endmodule

				.clocken2 (1'b1),
				.clocken3 (1'b1),
				.eccstatus ());
	defparam
		altsyncram_component.address_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_input_a = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_input_b = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_output_a = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_output_b = "BYPASS",

		altsyncram_component.numwords_b = 65536,
		altsyncram_component.operation_mode = "BIDIR_DUAL_PORT",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_aclr_a = "NONE",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_aclr_b = "NONE",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_reg_a = "CLOCK0",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.power_up_uninitialized = "FALSE",

files.autovcoder_032206.v:
module autovcoder_032206 (
    output [3:0] tmds,
    output [3:0] tmdsb,
    input  [7:0] switches,
    input        clk_100mhz,
    input        reset
);


  wire h_sync, v_sync, dataenable;
  wire [9:0] r_enc;
  wire [9:0] g_enc;
  wire [9:0] b_enc;

  wire pixel_clk1x, pixel_clk2x, pixel_clk10x;
  wire serdesstrobe;

  wire r10x, g10x, b10x;

  dvi_timing_controller timing (
      .pixel_x(),
      .pixel_y(),
      .h_blank(),
      .v_blank(),
      .h_sync(h_sync),
      .v_sync(v_sync),
      .dataenable(dataenable),
      .pixel_clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  dvi_encoder encoder_r (
      .q_out(r_enc),
      .D(switches),
      .C0(h_sync),
      .C1(v_sync),
      .DE(dataenable),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  dvi_encoder encoder_g (
      .q_out(g_enc),
      .D(switches ^ 8'b10100000),
      .C0(1'b0),
      .C1(1'b0),
      .DE(dataenable),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  dvi_encoder encoder_b (
      .q_out(b_enc),
      .D(~switches),
      .C0(1'b0),
      .C1(1'b0),
      .DE(dataenable),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  ten_to_one_serializer ser_r (
      .out(r10x),
      .in(r_enc),
      .datastrobe(serdesstrobe),
      .clk_10x(pixel_clk10x),
      .clk_2x(pixel_clk2x),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  ten_to_one_serializer ser_g (
      .out(g10x),
      .in(g_enc),
      .datastrobe(serdesstrobe),
      .clk_10x(pixel_clk10x),
      .clk_2x(pixel_clk2x),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  ten_to_one_serializer ser_b (
      .out(b10x),
      .in(b_enc),
      .datastrobe(serdesstrobe),
      .clk_10x(pixel_clk10x),
      .clk_2x(pixel_clk2x),
      .clk(pixel_clk1x),
      .reset(reset)
  );

  OBUFDS obuf_tmds[3:0] (
      .O (tmds[3:0]),
      .OB(tmdsb[3:0]),
      .I ({pixel_clk1x, b10x, g10x, r10x})
  );

  dvi_clock_manager clock_manager (
      .pixel_clk1x(pixel_clk1x),
      .pixel_clk2x(pixel_clk2x),
      .pixel_clk10x(pixel_clk10x),
      .strobe2x(serdesstrobe),
      .clkin(clk_100mhz),
      .reset(reset)
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_101522.v:
module autovcoder_101522 (
    input wire rst,
    input wire clk_sys,
    input wire ce,

    input wire [23:0] vol,
    input wire [ 7:0] env,

    input wire [23:0] freq,
    input wire [ 8:0] octave,
    input wire [ 2:0] freq_en,

    input wire [2:0] noise_en,
    input wire [1:0] noise_freq,

    input wire wr_addr,
    input wire wr_data,

    output wire [21:0] out
);

  wire tone0, tone1, tone2, noise;
  wire pulse_noise, pulse_envelope;
  wire [21:0] out0, out1, out2;

  saa1099_tone freq_gen0 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .ce(ce),
      .out(tone0),
      .octave(octave[8:6]),
      .freq(freq[23:16]),
      .pulse(pulse_noise)
  );
  saa1099_tone freq_gen1 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .ce(ce),
      .out(tone1),
      .octave(octave[5:3]),
      .freq(freq[15:8]),
      .pulse(pulse_envelope)
  );
  saa1099_tone freq_gen2 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .ce(ce),
      .out(tone2),
      .octave(octave[2:0]),
      .freq(freq[7:0]),
      .pulse()
  );
  saa1099_noise noise_gen (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .ce(ce),
      .pulse_noise(pulse_noise),
      .noise_freq(noise_freq),
      .out(noise)
  );

  saa1099_amp amp0 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .noise(noise),
      .wr_addr(wr_addr),
      .wr_data(wr_data),
      .pulse_envelope(pulse_envelope),
      .mixmode({noise_en[0], freq_en[0]}),
      .tone(tone0),
      .envreg(0),
      .vol(vol[23:16]),
      .out(out0)
  );
  saa1099_amp amp1 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .noise(noise),
      .wr_addr(wr_addr),
      .wr_data(wr_data),
      .pulse_envelope(pulse_envelope),
      .mixmode({noise_en[1], freq_en[1]}),
      .tone(tone1),
      .envreg(0),
      .vol(vol[15:8]),
      .out(out1)
  );
  saa1099_amp amp2 (
      .rst(rst),
      .clk_sys(clk_sys),
      .noise(noise),
      .wr_addr(wr_addr),
      .wr_data(wr_data),
      .pulse_envelope(pulse_envelope),
      .mixmode({noise_en[2], freq_en[2]}),
      .tone(tone2),
      .envreg(env),
      .vol(vol[7:0]),
      .out(out2)
  );

  assign out[10:0]  = out0[8:0] + out1[8:0] + out2[8:0];
  assign out[21:11] = out0[17:9] + out1[17:9] + out2[17:9];

endmodule

files.rtlpp_02917.v:
module rtlpp_02917(
  input aclk,
  input aresetn,
  input [11:0] s_axi_awid,
  input [31:0] s_axi_awaddr,
  input [3:0] s_axi_awlen,
  input [2:0] s_axi_awsize,
  input [1:0] s_axi_awburst,
  input [1:0] s_axi_awlock,
  input [3:0] s_axi_awcache,
  input [2:0] s_axi_awprot,
  input [3:0] s_axi_awqos,
  input s_axi_awvalid,
  output reg s_axi_awready,
  input [11:0] s_axi_wid,
  input [31:0] s_axi_wdata,
  input [3:0] s_axi_wstrb,
  input s_axi_wlast,
  input s_axi_wvalid,
  output reg s_axi_wready,
  output reg [11:0] s_axi_bid,
  output reg [1:0] s_axi_bresp,
  output reg s_axi_bvalid,
  input s_axi_bready,
  input [11:0] s_axi_arid,
  input [31:0] s_axi_araddr,
  input [3:0] s_axi_arlen,
  input [2:0] s_axi_arsize,
  input [1:0] s_axi_arburst,
  input [1:0] s_axi_arlock,
  input [3:0] s_axi_arcache,
  input [2:0] s_axi_arprot,
  input [3:0] s_axi_arqos,
  input s_axi_arvalid,
  output reg s_axi_arready,
  output reg [11:0] s_axi_rid,
  output reg [31:0] s_axi_rdata,
  output reg [1:0] s_axi_rresp,
  output reg s_axi_rlast,
  output reg s_axi_rvalid,
  input s_axi_rready,
  output reg [31:0] m_axi_awaddr,
  output reg [2:0] m_axi_awprot,
  output reg m_axi_awvalid,
  input m_axi_awready,
  output reg [31:0] m_axi_wdata,
  output reg [3:0] m_axi_wstrb,
  output reg m_axi_wvalid,
  input m_axi_wready,
  input [1:0] m_axi_bresp,
  input m_axi_bvalid,
  output reg m_axi_bready,
  output reg [31:0] m_axi_araddr,
  output reg [2:0] m_axi_arprot,
  output reg m_axi_arvalid,
  input m_axi_arready,
  input [31:0] m_axi_rdata,
  input [1:0] m_axi_rresp,
  input m_axi_rvalid,
  output reg m_axi_rready
);

  // Write address channel handshake logic
  always @(posedge aclk) begin
    if (!aresetn) begin
      s_axi_awready <= 0;
    end else if (s_axi_awvalid && !s_axi_awready) begin
      s_axi_awready <= 1;
      m_axi_awaddr <= s_axi_awaddr;
      m_axi_awprot <= s_axi_awprot;
      m_axi_awvalid <= 1;
    end else if (m_axi_awready && m_axi_awvalid) begin
      s_axi_awready <= 0;
      m_axi_awvalid <= 0;
    end
  end

  // Write data channel handshake logic
  always @(posedge aclk) begin
    if (!aresetn) begin
      s_axi_wready <= 0;
    end else if (s_axi_wvalid && !s_axi_wready) begin
      s_axi_wready <= 1;
      m_axi_wdata <= s_axi_wdata;
      m_axi_wstrb <= s_axi_wstrb;
      m_axi_wvalid <= 1;
    end else if (m_axi_wready && m_axi_wvalid) begin
      s_axi_wready <= 0;
      m_axi_wvalid <= 0;
    end
  end

  // Write response channel logic
  always @(posedge aclk) begin
    if (!aresetn) begin
      s_axi_bvalid <= 0;
    end else if (m_axi_bvalid && !s_axi_bvalid) begin
      s_axi_bvalid <= 1;
      s_axi_bresp <= m_axi_bresp;
    end else if (s_axi_bready && s_axi_bvalid) begin
      s_axi_bvalid <= 0;
    end
  end

  // Read address channel handshake logic
  always @(posedge aclk) begin
    if (!aresetn) begin
      s_axi_arready <= 0;
    end else if (s_axi_arvalid && !s_axi_arready) begin
      s_axi_arready <= 1;
      m_axi_araddr <= s_axi_araddr;
      m_axi_arprot <= s_axi_arprot;
      m_axi_arvalid <= 1;
    end else if (m_axi_arready && m_axi_arvalid) begin
      s_axi_arready <= 0;
      m_axi_arvalid <= 0;
    end
  end

  // Read data channel logic
  always @(posedge aclk) begin
    if (!aresetn) begin
      s_axi_rvalid <= 0;
    end else if (m_axi_rvalid && !s_axi_rvalid) begin
      s_axi_rvalid <= 1;
      s_axi_rdata <= m_axi_rdata;
      s_axi_rresp <= m_axi_rresp;
    end else if (s_axi_rready && s_axi_rvalid) begin
      s_axi_rvalid <= 0;
    end
  end

endmodule

files.autovcoder_130308.v:
module autovcoder_130308 (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input branch_out,
    output reg predicted_taken
);
    reg [1:0] state;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= 2'b00; // Reset state to Strongly Not Taken
        end else begin
            case (state)
                2'b00: begin
                    if (branch_out)
                        state <= 2'b01; // Transition to Weakly Not Taken
                    predicted_taken <= 1'b0; // Predict Not Taken
                end
                2'b01: begin
                    if (branch_out)
                        state <= 2'b10; // Transition to Weakly Taken
                    else
                        state <= 2'b00; // Transition to Strongly Not Taken
                    predicted_taken <= 1'b0; // Predict Not Taken
                end
                2'b10: begin
                    if (branch_out)
                        state <= 2'b11; // Transition to Strongly Taken
                    else
                        state <= 2'b01; // Transition to Weakly Not Taken
                    predicted_taken <= 1'b1; // Predict Taken
                end
                2'b11: begin
                    if (branch_out)
                        state <= 2'b11; // Remain in Strongly Taken
                    else
                        state <= 2'b10; // Transition to Weakly Taken
                    predicted_taken <= 1'b1; // Predict Taken
                end
                default: begin
                    state <= 2'b00; // Default to reset state
                    predicted_taken <= 1'b0; // Default prediction
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

files.origen_210432.v:
module origen_210432(
    input CLK,
    input [31:0] instruction,
    output reg [2:0] Instruction_type,
    output reg [3:0] Dataprocessing_instr_type,
    output reg [1:0] Memory_instr_type,
    output reg [1:0] Jump_instr_type
);

always @(*) begin
    case (instruction[27:26])
        2'b00: begin
            Instruction_type = 3'b001; // Data processing instruction
            case (instruction[24:21])
                4'b0000, 4'b0001, 4'b0010, 4'b0011, 4'b0100, 4'b0101, 4'b0110, 4'b0111, 4'b1100, 4'b1101, 4'b1110, 4'b1111:
                    Dataprocessing_instr_type = 4'b0001; // Immediate operand data processing instruction
                4'b1000, 4'b1001, 4'b1010, 4'b1011:
                    Dataprocessing_instr_type = 4'b0010; // Shift operand data processing instruction
                4'b1100, 4'b1101, 4'b1110, 4'b1111:
                    Dataprocessing_instr_type = 4'b0011; // Immediate shift operand data processing instruction
                default:
                    Dataprocessing_instr_type = 4'b0000; // Default/Unknown data processing instruction
            endcase
        end
        2'b01: begin
            Instruction_type = 3'b010; // Memory access instruction
            case (instruction[20])
                1'b0:
                    Memory_instr_type = 2'b01; // Load/Store instruction
                1'b1:
                    Memory_instr_type = 2'b10; // Load/Store instruction with writeback
                default:
                    Memory_instr_type = 2'b00; // Default/Unknown memory access instruction
            endcase
        end
        2'b10: begin
            Instruction_type = 3'b011; // Jump instruction
            case (instruction[24])
                1'b0:
                    Jump_instr_type = 2'b01; // Branch instruction
                1'b1:
                    Jump_instr_type = 2'b10; // Branch with link instruction
                default:
                    Jump_instr_type = 2'b00; // Default/Unknown jump instruction
            endcase
        end
        default:
            Instruction_type = 3'b000; // Default/Unknown instruction type
    endcase
end

endmodule

files.origen_165322.v:
module origen_165322 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [4:0] reg1,
    input wire [4:0] reg2,
    input wire [4:0] write_reg,
    input wire [31:0] write_data,
    input wire write,
    input wire load,
    input wire store,
    input wire [2:0] funct3,
    output wire [31:0] read1,
    output wire [31:0] read2
);

    reg [31:0] register [31:0];

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            for (integer i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin
                register[i] <= 32'b0;
            end
        end
        else begin
            if (write) begin
                if (store) begin
                    case (funct3)
                        3'b000: register[reg2] <= {{24{register[reg2][7]}}, register[reg2][7:0]}; // sb
                        3'b001: register[reg2] <= {{16{register[reg2][15]}}, register[reg2][15:0]}; // sh
                        3'b010: register[reg2] <= register[reg2]; // sw
                        default: register[reg2] <= 32'b0;
                    endcase
                end
                else if (load) begin
                    case (funct3)
                        3'b000: register[write_reg] <= {{24{write_data[7]}}, write_data[7:0]}; // lb
                        3'b001: register[write_reg] <= {{16{write_data[15]}}, write_data[15:0]}; // lh
                        3'b010: register[write_reg] <= write_data; // lw
                        3'b100: register[write_reg] <= {24'b0, write_data[7:0]}; // lbu
                        3'b101: register[write_reg] <= {16'b0, write_data[15:0]}; // lhu
                        default: register[write_reg] <= 32'b0;
                    endcase
                end
                else begin
                    register[write_reg] <= write_data;
                end
            end
        end
    end

    assign read1 = register[reg1];
    assign read2 = register[reg2];

endmodule
